name: Kill Sessions that have a Table Lock

content.query:
-- Get All Active Sessions

 SELECT * FROM sys.dm_pdw_exec_sessions 
 where 
 --login_name = 'JuGarcia' and 
  [status] not in ('Closed', 'Terminated') --and not sql_spid = @@SPID
 order by
 login_time desc
 GO

-- Find if a table has a lock on it

 select * from sys.dm_pdw_lock_waits where object_name = 'EDW.FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION'
 and session_id in ( SELECT session_id FROM sys.dm_pdw_exec_sessions 
 where 
 --login_name = 'JuGarcia' and 
  [status] not in ('Closed', 'Terminated'))

-- Kill a session

KILL 'SID12040793'
KILL 'SID12040792'
KILL 'SID12040791'
KILL 'SID12040790'
KILL 'SID12040789'
KILL 'SID12040788'
KILL 'SID12040787'
KILL 'SID12040786'
KILL 'SID12040785'
KILL 'SID12040784'
KILL 'SID12040623'
KILL 'SID12040622'
KILL 'SID12040621'
KILL 'SID12040620'
KILL 'SID12040619'
